claims.subject: acrB
claims.evidence_span: AcrAB-TolC pump is central to resistance against fluoroquinolones

claims.subject: acrB
claims.evidence_span: PAβN exposure reduced ciprofloxacin MICs by ≥ fourfold in 80% of high acrB expression isolates

claims.subject: marA
claims.evidence_span: Strong positive correlations were observed between marA/soxS and acrB expression

claims.subject: soxS
claims.evidence_span: Strong positive correlations were observed between marA/soxS and acrB expression

claims.subject: AcrAB-TolC
claims.evidence_span: PAβN-mediated efflux inhibition is associated with partial susceptibility restoration

claims.subject: AcrAB-TolC
claims.evidence_span: Phenotypic validation of efflux activity was performed using PAβN, an AcrAB-TolC inhibitor
